publications.ref: Lau E, Cao Q, Ng DC, Bleakley BJ, Dincer TU, Bot BM, Wang D, Liem DA, Lam MP, Ge J, Ping P. A large dataset of protein dynamics in the mammalian heart proteome. Sci Data. 2016 Mar 15;3:160015

Characteristics[Organism].evidence: across six mouse genetic strains commonly employed in biomedical research

Characteristics[OrganismPart].evidence: A large dataset of protein dynamics in the mammalian heart proteome

Characteristics[Label].evidence: Using an integrated platform of metabolic labeling, high-resolution mass spectrometry

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: integrated platform of metabolic labeling, high-resolution mass spectrometry and computational analysis

Characteristics[Disease].reasoning: 論文中で'hypertrophic conditions'と'heart failure'が言及されているが、これが実験条件なのか疾患モデルなのか不明確
Characteristics[Disease].needs: Methods セクションで実験デザインの詳細確認が必要

Characteristics[Strain].reasoning: 'six mouse genetic strains commonly employed in biomedical research'と記載されているが、具体的な系統名は不明
Characteristics[Strain].needs: Methods セクションで使用した具体的なマウス系統名の確認が必要

Characteristics[Treatment].reasoning: 'healthy and hypertrophic conditions'での比較実験が示唆されている
Characteristics[Treatment].needs: 肥大条件を誘導した具体的な処置方法の確認が必要

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: マウス心臓組織を用いた代謝標識とMS解析による大規模プロテオーム動態研究。6つのマウス系統で健常と肥大条件を比較。具体的な系統名、疾患誘導方法、処置条件の詳細はMethodsセクションでの確認が必要。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: Proteins were digested on-filter (16 h, 37 °C) with sequencing-grade modified trypsin (50:1, Promega)

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: alkylated in the dark (ambient temperature, 30 min) with iodoacetamide (9 mM)

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: the samples were reduced (70 °C, 5 min) with dithiothreitol (3 mM)

Characteristics[Label].evidence: To initiate deuterium labeling, each animal received two intraperitoneal injections of 500-μl 99.9% (molar ratio) 2H2O-saline... Following the injections, the animals had access ad libitum to 8% (v/v; 7.25% molar ratio) 2H2O in the drinking water

Comment[FractionationMethod].evidence: we performed high-pH/low–pH two-dimensional reversed-phase chromatography to separate peptide samples prior to MS/MS

Comment[NumberOfFractions].evidence: Twelve fractions were collected every 2 min from min 16–40

Comment[Separation].evidence: Cardiac proteins were extracted following subcellular fractionation by differential centrifugation over density gradients

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: サンプル調製では標準的なトリプシン消化、DTT還元、IAA修飾を実施。2H2O代謝標識による動的プロテオーム解析で、5種類の翻訳後修飾を検索対象とした。前処理として亜細胞分画と高pH/低pH二次元LC分離（12フラクション）を実施。エンリッチメント手法や標準物質の添加は記載なし。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: High-resolution tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS) was performed on a single LTQ Orbitrap Elite instrument (Thermo Scientific)

Comment[FragmentationMethod].evidence: rapid IT MS2 scans on the top 15 ions with monoisotopic peak selection

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: each FT MS1 survey scan was analyzed at 60,000 resolving power in profile mode, followed by rapid IT MS2 scans on the top 15 ions with monoisotopic peak selection

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: coupled on-line to the nano-UPLC system through a Thermo EasySpray interface

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: MS signals were acquired in Fourier-Transform/Ion-Trap (FT/IT) mode: each FT MS1 survey scan was analyzed at 60,000 resolving power in profile mode, followed by rapid IT MS2 scans

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].evidence: Tryptic, semi-tryptic, and non-tryptic peptides within a 20-ppm parent mass window surrounding the candidate precursor mass were searched

Comment[FragmentMassTolerance].evidence: Peptide ions from up to 3 isotopic peaks with fragment mass tolerance of 600 ppm were allowed

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].evidence: Static cysteine carbamidomethylation (C +57.02146 Da) modification and up to three of the following variable modifications were allowed

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: 0–110 min: 0–40% solvent B in solvent A; 110–117 min: 40–80% solvent B in solvent A; 117–120 min: 80% solvent B in solvent A

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: LTQ Orbitrap Elite装置を用いたデータ依存取得（DDA）でMS1はFT（60,000分解能）、MS2はイオントラップで測定。前駆体20ppm、フラグメント600ppmの質量許容誤差でデータベース検索。120分グラジエント、300nl/min流速のnanoLC-MS/MS分析。コリジョンエネルギーは記載なし。

Comment[FractionIdentifier].evidence: Raw file names contain fraction identifiers: 'Mito' for mitochondrial fraction, 'Nucl' for nuclear fraction, 'Cyto' for cytoplasmic fraction. This matches the Methods description: 'subcellular fractionation by differential centrifugation over density gradients' resulting in 'nuclear and extracellular fraction', 'organelle-depleted intracellular fraction', and 'mitochondrial and microsomal fraction'.

per_file.example: Each strain has replicates at each time point, as evidenced by multiple files per condition

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: Methods states 'From each experimental group we euthanized two mice at each of day 0, 1, 3, 5, 7, 10, and 14' indicating 2 biological replicates per time point per condition.

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: Methods explicitly states: 'From each experimental group we euthanized two mice at each of day 0, 1, 3, 5, 7, 10, and 14 following the first 2H2O injection'

Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.evidence: Methods describes fractionation approach: 'Twelve fractions were collected every 2 min from min 16–40' for the high-pH/low-pH two-dimensional reversed-phase chromatography

FactorValue[Treatment].evidence: Raw file names contain 'CTRL' and 'ISO' tokens. Methods describes: 'In the cardiac hypertrophy groups, we surgically implanted subcutaneous micro-osmotic pumps...calibrated to deliver 15 mg⋅kg−1⋅d−1 of isoproterenol over 14 days'

FactorValue[FractionIdentifier].evidence: File names contain fraction identifiers matching Methods description of subcellular fractionation producing three fractions

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].reasoning: Methods states 'The entire dataset comprises 1,404 LC-MS/MS experiments' but this may include technical replicates. Actual samples would be 6 strains × 2 conditions × 7 time points × 2 biological replicates × 3 fractions = 504 base samples
Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].needs: Clarification of whether 1,404 includes all fractions and technical replicates

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: Raw file analysis confirmed experimental design: 6 mouse strains (AJ, BALB, C57, CEJ, DBA, FVB) with control vs isoproterenol treatment across 7 time points (d00-d14) with 2 biological replicates each. Three subcellular fractions (Mito, Nucl, Cyto) were analyzed per sample, with 12 LC fractions per analysis. Total of 1,404 LC-MS/MS runs performed. File naming convention clearly indicates strain, treatment, fraction, time point, and replicate information.
